data.description: ECB: Economic growth seen at -2.1% in year ahead vs -0.9% seen a month earlier.
ECB: One year ahead inflation expectations rise to 4.0% in March from 2.5% in Feb.
ECB: Inflation expectations 3 years ahead at 3.0% vs 2.5%, 5 years ahead rise to 2.4% from 2.3%.

data.title: Public safety takes priority as Boldyn, EE and TfL deploy Emergency Services Network infrastructure across the London Underground
data.description: In London on April 28, 2026, Boldyn Networks (Boldyn) announced their selection to provide 4G mobile network infrastructure for the Emergency Services Network (ESN) throughout the London Underground. This upgrade is a significant move towards enhancing public safety in London and ensuring connectivity for emergency services personnel.

data.title: Grundfos Pumps India Receives Frost & Sullivan's 2026 Indian Company of the Year Recognition for Leadership in Sustainable Pumps for Industrial Water
data.description: Grundfos Pumps India has been acknowledged for its strong presence in the market, particularly in sustainable pumps, industrial water management, and energy-efficient pumping solutions. This recognition showcases the company's leadership in leveraging digitalization and water stewardship. The announcement was made on April 28, 2026 in San Antonio, as Frost & Sullivan commended Grundfos Pumps India's efforts.

data.title: Amber Premium FZE Secures Virtual Asset Service Provider License from Dubai's VARA
data.description: In Dubai, UAE, on April 28, 2026, Amber International Holding Limited, listed on Nasdaq as AMBR, introduced its digital wealth management platform "Amber Premium." This platform, operated by Amber Group, caters to high-net-worth individuals and top institutions.

data.title: Medtronic announces CE Mark for Stealth AXiS™ surgical system
data.description: Medtronic, a prominent healthcare technology company, has recently obtained CE mark for its Stealth AXiS™ platform in Europe. This certification allows Medtronic to expedite the distribution of its integrated planning, navigation, and robotics system in the region. The company is based in GALWAY, Ireland, and made this announcement on April 28, 2026. This development comes after receiving clearances from the FDA. Medtronic aims to enhance medical procedures by making this advanced technology more widely available.

data.title: Private Domain Data-Driven AI Evolution: KeyAPI.ai Unlocks Global Omnichannel Data
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in Beijing, it was reported that artificial intelligence is becoming increasingly widespread across various sectors. The competition among AI applications is no longer solely based on model parameters, but has now evolved to focus on the quality of data and the ability to adapt to different scenarios. There is a notable consensus within the industry on this shift in focus, highlighting the importance of these factors in driving AI development and implementation.

data.title: AMI Accelerates AI Factory Command and Control with New MegaRAC OneTree Community Edition
data.description: Enhances dedication to open innovation by launching revised manageability firmware based on OpenBMC, preparing to contribute to the OCP Marketplace, and introducing the Partner Alliance program. The announcement was made in Barcelona, Spain and Atlanta. The news comes ahead of the 2026 OCP EMEA Summit. AMI® highlighted its commitment to collaboration and development within the industry. These initiatives emphasize the company's focus on fostering innovation in the technology sector.

data.title: BOLD NEW LOOK, A BRIGHTER NEW MOOD: MIRINDA® LAUNCHES A "SMILE PLEASE" PLATFORM GLOBALLY
data.description: PURCHASE, N.Y., April 28, 2026 - Mirinda® has introduced a refreshed global visual identity through the #SmilePlease global platform, promoting positivity and embracing spontaneous happiness. The launch emphasizes Mirinda's dedication to bold and flavorful fun. The new global initiative aims to echo the brand's commitment to joy and optimism, appealing to consumers worldwide. The announcement was made today, indicating Mirinda's initiative to boost its brand presence and consumer engagement with a renewed focus on creating memorable moments of happiness.

data.title: D.Energy Announces Official Sustainability Partnership with TGR Haas F1 Team
data.description: A leading blockchain specialist partners with a Formula 1 team to uphold clean energy transparency in a top-tier motorsport setting. The collaboration, announced in Dubai, UAE on April 28, 2026, introduces D.Energy, the inaugural Layer 1 blockchain running on a Proof of Energy consensus protocol. This synergy aims to enhance accountability in Formula 1, renowned for its rigorous operations, by leveraging cutting-edge blockchain technology.

data.title: Labor Day Recovery Starts Here: LiberNovo Omni Redefines Work & Recovery with Dynamic Ergonomics
data.description: As International Workers' Day nears on April 28, 2026, the concept of labor is quietly evolving in Hong Kong. The shift is prominent among digital workers such as programmers, strategists, and creatives. Rather than physical productivity, their endurance is gauged by other factors. This marks a significant change in the workforce amidst a digital era.

data.title: Atos Group Launches an Integrated Digital Sovereignty Offering for Regulated and AI-Driven Environment
data.description: The Atos Group has introduced a new comprehensive Digital Sovereignty package aimed at assisting organizations in maintaining control, authority, and accountability over their digital operations. This offering is designed to address the increasing need for companies to have autonomy in the digital realm. By leveraging this integrated solution, businesses can enhance their governance and data protection mechanisms, ensuring a more secure and compliant digital environment.
AIR FRANCE, AIRBUS A350 COMPONENT SERVICES JV CLEARED BY EU

data.title: AAVE faces record liquidity freeze post rsETH exploit. $292M hacked, causing WETH liquidity to plummet from $689M to $1.5M in hours.
data.description: A fraudulent message pretending to be from LayerZero resulted in the loss of $292 million, leading to a crisis in liquidity on the Aave platform. Within a few hours, the liquidity of Wrapped Ethereum (WETH) plummeted from $689 million to just $1.5 million.

data.title: BitMine's Ethereum holdings surpass 5M ETH, despite $6.5B unrealized losses; uses staking rewards for revenue.
data.description: BitMine has increased its Ethereum treasury to more than 5 million ETH, even though they are facing unrealized losses of $6.5 billion. They are utilizing staking rewards as a source of income.

data.title: EU imposes sanctions on Russian crypto platforms and CBDC, with the 20th package banning them fully to prevent sanctions evasion.
data.description: The European Union has implemented its 20th sanctions package, focusing on Russian cryptocurrency exchanges, stablecoins, and the digital ruble, in an effort to prevent evasion of sanctions.This move is part of the EU's strategy to combat illicit activities and restrict financial transactions.

data.title: Steele Honda Offers the Latest 2026 Honda CR-V Hybrid
data.description: Steele Honda in the vicinity of St. John's, NL, is encouraging drivers to take a test drive of the latest 2026 Honda CR-V Hybrid to witness its impressive performance, capabilities, and value. The dealership is specifically targeting residents of St. John's, NL, who are interested in an upscale, fuel-efficient SUV option. The new model is designed to offer a blend of power and efficiency, making it an appealing choice for potential buyers in the area.

data.title: Grand View Research Announces Strategic Investment and Technology Partnership with Dview to Accelerate AI & Analytics GTM
data.description: On April 28, 2026, in San Francisco, a notable global market intelligence and advisory firm called Grand View Research (GVR) revealed a significant development. They shared news of a strategic investment and a long-term technology partnership established with Dview Technologies, a company specializing in advanced analytics solutions powered by artificial intelligence. This collaboration is expected to bring together the expertise of both firms to enhance services and capabilities.

data.title: Breaking Physical Limits to Reshape Future Mobility: Dreame Nebula NEXT Debuts Rocket-Powered Concept Car "Jet Edition" in U.S.
data.description: In San Francisco on April 27, 2026, Dreame Nebula NEXT, a renowned global electric vehicle brand, introduced a groundbreaking hypercar named the Nebula NEXT 01 Concept Jet Edition. This exceptional vehicle features a distinctive combination of a rocket engine and an electric vehicle engine. The unveiling took place at a significant launch event in San Francisco, showcasing the innovative capabilities of the brand.
